[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001001000 2
1 101111111 8
2 101000101 4
3 110100111 6
4 011010111 6
5 001111110 6
6 111111011 8
7 111111111 a

01 10 110111111 8
12 21 011111111 8
23 32 101111111 8 match 1
34 43 111111111 a match 7
45 54 110110101 6
56 65 100110101 5
67 76 111011101 7
70 07 111111101 8

02 20 101111101 7
13 31 111111111 a match 7
24 42 111111101 8
35 53 101111111 8 match 1
46 64 110110101 6
57 75 011101101 6
60 06 100110101 5
71 17 011011111 7

03 30 101111111 8 match 1
14 41 110111111 8
25 52 001111101 6
36 63 101111011 7
47 74 111111101 8
50 05 100110101 5
61 16 110011111 7
72 27 011111100 6

04 40 110110101 6
15 51 010111111 7
26 62 101111101 7
37 73 111111111 a match 7
